# Gloria Qi — Aspiring AI PM

Fake it until you make it.

Junior at UW Informatics, building toward AI product management one project at a time. I think in user problems, not features — and I learn fastest by shipping.

Name: Gloria Qi
Role: Aspiring AI PM
Location: Seattle · UW Informatics
Tags: Informatics @ UW, Aspiring AI PM, Builder, Seattle, Open to Internship

# Shipped

## SHIP-01 · SHIPPED · fitty
A calorie tracking app with Mochi, an animated companion that reacts to your daily nutrition progress. Built full-stack from scratch.
Impact: live at fitty-nu.vercel.app
Tags: SIDE PROJECT, Full-stack, React, Node.js, Supabase
Updated: 2026-04-22
Links:
  - Demo: https://fitty-nu.vercel.app
  - GitHub: https://github.com/Gloria-Qi0311/calarie_app

## Context

fitty is a calorie tracking app built around Mochi, an animated companion that reacts to your daily nutrition progress. The goal was to make habit tracking feel less clinical and more personal.

## What I owned

- Designed and built the full frontend in React + Vite + TypeScript
- Wired up Node.js backend and Supabase for food logging and user data
- Built the Mochi animation system that responds to daily progress state
- Shipped to Vercel (frontend) + Railway (backend)

## Outcome

Live and accessible. The Mochi feedback loop made calorie logging feel less like a chore.

## SHIP-02 · SHIPPED · HuskyMatch
A full-stack student networking platform for UW — profile-based matching powered by OpenAI embeddings, with messaging and social feed.
Tags: SIDE PROJECT, Full-stack, React, FastAPI, OpenAI, Supabase
Updated: 2026-04-23
Links:
  - GitHub: https://github.com/Gloria-Qi0311/HuskyMatch

## Context

HuskyMatch (HuskyConnect) is a student networking platform for UW students to find classmates, collaborators, and community connections through profile-based matching.

## What I owned

- Built the React 19 + Vite frontend with profile creation and editing flows
- Integrated OpenAI embeddings for interest-based recommendation engine
- Set up FastAPI backend with SQLAlchemy and Supabase Postgres
- Implemented direct messaging and social feed features

## Outcome

Full-stack platform with AI-powered matching across student profiles.

## SHIP-03 · SHIPPED · LexVault
A legal document search tool — designed end-to-end in Figma and implemented as a working frontend.
Tags: SIDE PROJECT, UI/UX Design, Figma, Frontend, Search
Updated: 2026-04-24
Links:
  - GitHub: https://github.com/Gloria-Qi0311/Lexvault

## Context

LexVault is a legal document search tool designed to help users navigate complex legal documents efficiently. Started from a Figma design and implemented as a working frontend.

## What I owned

- Designed the full product in Figma (search UX, document viewer, result ranking)
- Implemented the frontend from the design spec

## Outcome

End-to-end ownership from design to implementation.

## SHIP-04 · SHIPPED · Savorly
A recipe search engine built with BM25 and PyTerrier — preprocesses, indexes, and ranks recipe data for keyword queries.
Tags: COURSE PROJECT, Python, Information Retrieval, BM25, INFO376
Updated: 2025-11-30
Links:
  - GitHub: https://github.com/Gloria-Qi0311/info376-Savorly

## Context

Savorly is a recipe search engine built with BM25 and PyTerrier for an information retrieval course (INFO376). The system preprocesses raw recipe data, builds an inverted index, and supports keyword search.

## What I owned

- Built the full preprocessing pipeline (lowercasing, stopword removal, stemming)
- Implemented BM25 retrieval with PyTerrier
- Designed the index structure for recipe fields (name, ingredients, steps)

## Outcome

Functional search engine returning ranked BM25 results for recipe queries.
# Now

## NOW-01 · NOW · Lark Loom
An AI agent that lives in Feishu group chats, turning fragmented IM conversations into structured docs, task tables, and presentations.
Impact: ByteDance Lark AI Campus Challenge — finalist
Tags: COMPETITION, AI Agent, TypeScript, Node.js, Lark
Updated: 2026-05-10
Links:
  - GitHub: https://github.com/EdwinjJ1/lark-loom

## Context

Lark Loom is a group-chat AI agent built for the ByteDance Lark AI Campus Challenge. It lives inside Feishu (Lark) group chats and helps project teams structure the chaos of IM conversations into actionable outputs.

## What I owned

- Designed and implemented the delivery layer (TypeScript + Node.js)
- Built the Skill pipeline: GapDetector → SkillRouter → CardBuilder
- Implemented MessageBuffer sliding window for batching fragmented messages
- Set up CI workflow and enforced Result<T> error boundary across all modules

## Outcome

In competition — finals on May 14, 2026. Covers recall, summary, and archive skill chains end-to-end.

## NOW-02 · NOW · DiscountedAirfare
A platform for discovering discounted airfare — making fare search less overwhelming and more decision-friendly.
Tags: SIDE PROJECT, Frontend, Travel, Search
Updated: 2026-04-12
Links:
  - GitHub: https://github.com/Gloria-Qi0311/DiscountedAirfare

## Context

A discounted airfare discovery platform — helping users find deals without getting lost in fare complexity.

## What I owned

- Frontend design and implementation

## Outcome

In progress.

# Lens — how I think

- / 01 Build it to understand it.
  Reading about something is not the same as shipping it and watching it break.
- / 02 Start with the problem, not the feature.
  Features are guesses. Problems are real.
- / 03 The boundary matters as much as the capability.
  Knowing what AI can't do is as useful as knowing what it can.
- / 04 AI is a multiplier, not a replacement.
  The human judgment part is still the hard part.

# Contact

Junior at UW Informatics, open to AI PM internships for summer / fall 2026. Also down to collaborate on side projects. Tell me what you're building.
